The '''Techrats''' was a youth [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]], circa [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. The group was made up of pro-tech teenagers who favored joining the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and abandoning the old, low-tech ways favored by the [[Council of Elders (Cerea)|Elders]]. They painted their faces to hide their identities.

Unknowingly, the kids became involved in a conspiracy by a corrupt Elder to smuggle in banned technology in exchange for rare Cerean minerals.

They were led by [[Skeel (Cerean)|Skeel]], who met an untimely end in a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]]-race accident in the [[Outsider Citadel/Legends|Outsider Citadel]]. Some other members of the gang were [[Maj-Odo-Nomor]], [[Sylvn (Cerean)|Sylvn]], [[Twin (Cerean)|Twin]], and [[Kordren (Cerean)|Kordren]].
